claims.statement: As of August 30, 2025 UniFirst employed approximately 16,000 team partners across its operations, with less than 1% of its U.S. employees represented by a union.
claims.quote: As of August 30, 2025, we employed approximately 16,000 persons and less than 1% of our U.S. employees are represented by a union pursuant to a collective bargaining agreement.

claims.statement: UniFirst is vertically integrated: during fiscal 2025 it manufactured approximately 62% of the garments placed in service, and its facilities include a 325,000 square foot Owensboro, Kentucky distribution center plus almost all of its industrial laundry processing plants.
claims.quote: During the fiscal year ended August 30, 2025 (“fiscal 2025”), we manufactured approximately 62% of the garments placed in service.

claims.statement: UniFirst total consolidated revenues were essentially flat in fiscal 2025 at $2,432.4 million versus $2,427.4 million in fiscal 2024, an increase of $4.9 million or 0.2%; fiscal 2024 included an extra 53rd week of operations.
claims.locator: Item 7 MD&A, Results of Operations — Revenues (p. 39)

claims.statement: UniFirst consolidated operating income was $184.5 million in fiscal 2025 versus $183.6 million in fiscal 2024, up $0.9 million or 0.5%.

UniFirst's consolidated operating margin in fiscal 2025 was approximately 7.6% ($184.5M operating income / $2,432.4M revenue = 7.58%), far below Cintas's reported ~22% operating margin, framing the central margin-gap thesis of the deal.
Cintas reports operating income for fiscal 2025 of $2.36 billion (up 14.1% from $2.07 billion in fiscal 2024), which on $10.34 billion of revenue implies an operating margin of approximately 22.8%.
claims.quote: Operating income for fiscal 2025 increased to $2.36 billion compared to $2.07 billion for fiscal 2024, an increase of 14.1%.
claims.locator: Ex-99.1 earnings release, fiscal year summary

claims.statement: UniFirst's revenue is geographically concentrated in the U.S. ($2,245.9 million in fiscal 2025) with Europe and Canada contributing $186.5 million; total revenue grew from $2,233.0 million in fiscal 2023 to $2,427.4 million in fiscal 2024 to $2,432.4 million in fiscal 2025.
claims.locator: Item 8 Financial Statements, Segment Reporting — revenues by geography (p. F-section)

claims.statement: UniFirst's Uniform & Facility Service Solutions segment generated $2,218.6 million of revenue in fiscal 2025 (down $5.5 million or 0.2% from $2,224.0 million in fiscal 2024), and represented approximately 91.2% of total revenues.
claims.locator: Item 7 MD&A, Results of Operations — Revenues by segment (p. 39)

claims.statement: Approximately 91.2% of UniFirst's revenues in fiscal 2025 were derived from its Uniform & Facility Service Solutions segment.
claims.quote: Approximately 91.2% of our revenues in fiscal 2025 were derived from our Uniform & Facility Service Solutions segment.

claims.statement: UniFirst's First Aid & Safety Solutions segment generated $114.6 million of revenue in fiscal 2025 (up $8.3 million or 7.8% from $106.3 million in fiscal 2024), representing approximately 4.7% of total revenues.
claims.locator: Item 7 MD&A, Results of Operations — Revenues by segment (p. 39)
